bottom_line: Fix prompt-template report paths first (active vs work); this is the highest-frequency low-effort source of retries in this item.
coverage_notes: DB telemetry available (iw db-identity check: UP). Reviewed workflow manifest and item-status JSON. All step logs were <= 1 MB, so full files were inspected selectively with targeted reads and global error-pattern search (rg) across ai-dev/logs/I-00088_*.log; deep context reads were taken around S01 RED evidence and S10 failure/pass boundaries.

findings.title: Prompt templates reference ai-dev/work reports while runtime reports live under ai-dev/active
findings.recommendation: Update prompt/design templates to reference ai-dev/active/<ID>/reports for step reports, or instruct agents to probe active/work paths before failing reads.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Update prompt templates to use ai-dev/active/<ID>/reports for runtime step reports (instead of ai-dev/work) to reduce code-review retry thrash; analyzed in I-00088 (see ai-dev/work/I-00088/reports/I-00088_self_assess_report.md).

findings.title: Integration QV gate failed once on e2e SSE request_id ordering, then passed on rerun
findings.recommendation: Stabilize test_e2e_opencode_stub SSE sequencing assertions by waiting for request_id-bearing events deterministically instead of fixed-position assumptions.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00088_S10_run3.log:3188 - 'Failed I-00088 step S10: integration-tests failed: exit=2'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Harden tests/integration/test_e2e_opencode_stub.py against SSE event ordering flake that raised request_id KeyError and caused a failed integration gate rerun in I-00088 (see ai-dev/work/I-00088/reports/I-00088_self_assess_report.md).
